note: Production estimates from independent sources. USDA = USDA FAS PSD (Coffee: World Markets and Trade, Dec 2025) + USDA Uganda Coffee Annual (UG2025-0001, May 2025); UCDA = Uganda Coffee Development Authority monthly reports (production inferred from exports + domestic use where UCDA does not publish a standalone production headline); ICO = International Coffee Organization Coffee Market Report. Static seed — refresh after each crop year's UCDA / USDA release.
